loop.observation: The embedded privacy allowlist is executable policy data, but repository coverage still counted it as internal loop debt.
loop.hypothesis: Declaring the allowlist evidence loop makes local-path and secret leakage boundaries visible as executable knowledge.
loop.execute: Run privacymetadata and hostintegration tests to validate allowlist surfaces, server-facing JSON shapes, generated docs, and public CI evidence upload.
loop.evaluate: The verifier fails when allowed/forbidden paths, required privacy surfaces, server-facing struct shape, generated docs, or workflow wiring drift.
loop.retrospective: C10/C11 privacy metadata remains embedded runtime policy while reader-facing metadata docs are generated from the same allowlist.
